label: Credit
rdfs_comment: The credit to person(s) and/or organisation(s) required by the supplier of the item to be used when published. This is a free-text field.
skos_scopeNote: free text for "Please cite this as ..."
dcterms_description: IPTC also refers to this generically as a "Credit Line" as it is frequently displayed with the media. URLs in this namespace do not dereference, but authoritative documentation is at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/adobe/XMP-Toolkit-SDK/main/docs/XMPSpecificationPart2.pdf
